ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is part of */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions that might affect the study */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for communication purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the study */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area or domain of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "block_description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the block is part of */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the block */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the block */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the block */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the trial is part of */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the trial within the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracked_data" (
  "tracked_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracked data point */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the data is from */,
  "tracked_type" TEXT /* Type of data being tracked (e.g., wrist, hand, head) */,
  "time_ms" REAL /* Time stamp of the data point in milliseconds */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the trial the data is from */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the data is from */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the data is from */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the trial within the block */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the tracked data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the tracked data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracked_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracked_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracked_data_tracked_type FOREIGN KEY ("tracked_type") REFERENCES tracked_types ("tracked_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracked_data_phase FOREIGN KEY ("phase") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracked_data_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracked_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "tracked_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tracked data point the position is from */,
  "pos_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the position */,
  "pos_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the position */,
  "pos_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the position */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the position data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the position data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_tracked_id FOREIGN KEY ("tracked_id") REFERENCES tracked_data ("tracked_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracked_types" (
  "tracked_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracked type */,
  "tracked_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tracked type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tracked type */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for tracking */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the tracked type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracked_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the phase */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the phase */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
